statements.sql: select exists(select * from `products` where `ProductSlug` = 'as-shabab-panjabi-14' and `id` != 1) as `exists`

update `products` set `brand_id` = '', `ProductDetails` = '


✨This Panjabi blend classic tradition with a modern, refined finish, making it perfect for both festive and formal occasions.

📌 Key features & Specifications
Fabric: Jacquard Print
Pattern: All-over subtle textured design
Collar Type: Mandarin Collar with embroidered detailing
Closure: Premium Snap Button
Fit type: Regular fit
Sleeve Type: Full sleeves featuring contrast piping detail

⭐ Why You’ll Love It
✅ Unique & Modern Designs
✅ Elegant color that complements all skin tones
✅ Breathable fabric ensures all-day comfort in warm climates
✅ Versatile styling
✅ Good quality embroidered threads
✅ Best finishing quality with proper QC
✅ Customer-friendly return policy

⚠️Color/Image Disclaimer: Actual product color and design may vary slightly from images due lighting conditions and different screen settings.

', `products`.`updated_at` = '2026-04-05 11:34:24' where `id` = 1
